requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter) — Romania
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）——罗马尼亚
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）——羅馬尼亞

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to the Romanian grid must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), as adopted by ASRO as SR EN 50549-1/-2. At the EU level, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above thresholds set by ANRE, covering fault ride-through, frequency response, and reactive power exchange. ANRE Order No. 30/2013 (Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de distribuție, CRED) and the Transelectrica grid code (Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de transport, CTET) specify national interconnection requirements. The Romanian grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz; nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. Romanian-language technical documentation is expected by Transelectrica and distribution network operators (DNOs).
summary.zh: 接入罗马尼亚电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准（已由ASRO采标为SR EN 50549-1/-2）。在欧盟层面，欧盟法规2016/631（发电厂要求，RfG）对超过ANRE设定门槛的发电模块规定了强制要求，涵盖故障穿越、频率响应和无功功率交换。ANRE第30/2013号令（配电网技术规范CRED）及Transelectrica电网规范（输电网技术规范CTET）规定了国家层面的并网要求。罗马尼亚电网运行电压为230/400 V、50 Hz，名义电压与中国220/380 V有所不同。Transelectrica及配电网运营商通常要求提供罗马尼亚语技术文件。
summary.zht: 接入羅馬尼亞電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準（已由ASRO採標為SR EN 50549-1/-2）。在歐盟層面，歐盟法規2016/631（發電廠要求，RfG）對超過ANRE設定門檻的發電模組規定強制要求，涵蓋故障穿越、頻率響應和無功功率交換。ANRE第30/2013號令（配電網技術規範CRED）及Transelectrica電網規範（輸電網技術規範CTET）規定了國家層面的並網要求。羅馬尼亞電網運行電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz，名義電壓與中國220/380 V有所不同。Transelectrica及配電網運營商通常要求提供羅馬尼亞語技術文件。

standards_or_laws: ANRE Order No. 30/2013 — Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de distribuție (CRED)
Transelectrica — Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de transport (CTET)

summary.en: GB/T 34120-2023 (Electrochemical energy storage system for connecting to the grid — Part 1: General specification; replacing GB/T 34120-2017) sets Chinese grid-connection requirements for electrochemical BESS. It is a recommended (推荐性) national standard, but compliance is effectively required by State Grid and Southern Grid connection rules. The Chinese standard is aligned to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid and does not address Romania's nominal 230/400 V conditions, ANRE/Transelectrica grid-code reactive-power curves, or Romanian anti-islanding thresholds.
summary.zh: GB/T 34120-2023（并网型电化学储能系统技术要求，取代GB/T 34120-2017）规定了中国电化学储能系统的并网要求。该标准为推荐性国家标准，但国家电网和南方电网的接入规则实际上要求合规。中国标准基于220/380 V、50 Hz电网，不涵盖罗马尼亚名义230/400 V条件、ANRE/Transelectrica电网规范无功功率曲线或罗马尼亚防孤岛门限要求。
summary.zht: GB/T 34120-2023（並網型電化學儲能系統技術要求，取代GB/T 34120-2017）規定中國電化學儲能系統的並網要求。該標準為推薦性國家標準，但國家電網和南方電網的接入規則實際上要求合規。中國標準基於220/380 V、50 Hz電網，不涵蓋羅馬尼亞名義230/400 V條件、ANRE/Transelectrica電網規範無功功率曲線或羅馬尼亞防孤島門限要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Electrochemical energy storage system for connecting to the grid (recommended national standard, supersedes GB/T 34120-2017)

gap.en: Key gap: Chinese PCS certified only to GB/T 34120 do not demonstrate compliance with EN 50549-1/-2, EU RfG 2016/631, ANRE CRED, or Transelectrica CTET. Voltage nominal difference (220/380 V China vs 230/400 V Romania) requires re-parameterisation and re-testing. Reactive-power curves, anti-islanding settings, and frequency-response thresholds per Romanian/EU grid codes are not validated by GB/T 34120 test reports. Romanian-language grid-connection application documentation required by Transelectrica/DNOs is not provided by default by Chinese manufacturers.
gap.zh: 主要差距：仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器，无法证明符合EN 50549-1/-2、欧盟RfG 2016/631、ANRE CRED或Transelectrica CTET要求。名义电压差异（中国220/380 V与罗马尼亚230/400 V）需要重新参数化和测试。GB/T 34120测试报告未对罗马尼亚及欧盟电网规范的无功功率曲线、防孤岛设定和频率响应门限进行验证。Transelectrica及配电网运营商要求的罗马尼亚语并网申请文件，中国制造商默认不提供。
gap.zht: 主要差距：僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器，無法證明符合EN 50549-1/-2、歐盟RfG 2016/631、ANRE CRED或Transelectrica CTET要求。名義電壓差異（中國220/380 V與羅馬尼亞230/400 V）需要重新參數化和測試。GB/T 34120測試報告未對羅馬尼亞及歐盟電網規範的無功功率曲線、防孤島設定和頻率響應門限進行驗證。Transelectrica及配電網運營商要求的羅馬尼亞語並網申請文件，中國製造商默認不提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 (as SR EN) and EU RfG 2016/631 are binding for grid connection in Romania. ANRE CRED and Transelectrica CTET are mandatory national grid codes.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended (推荐性) national standard in China, but compliance is effectively required by State Grid and Southern Grid connection rules.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Romanian/EU grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2, EU RfG 2016/631, ANRE CRED, and Transelectrica CTET is required before connecting to the Romanian grid. Voltage nominal re-parameterisation is also required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合罗马尼亚及欧盟并网要求。在接入罗马尼亚电网前，须按EN 50549-1/-2、欧盟RfG 2016/631、ANRE CRED及Transelectrica CTET进行完整重新测试，并须进行名义电压重新参数化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合羅馬尼亞及歐盟並網要求。在接入羅馬尼亞電網前，須按EN 50549-1/-2、歐盟RfG 2016/631、ANRE CRED及Transelectrica CTET進行完整重新測試，並須進行名義電壓重新參數化。
